name: subscript_forward_no_referent

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.16 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION] 下付き小文字 with no earlier target is self-contained, rendered <sub>. The target is absent from the preceding text (no-referent), so §6.14 degradation no longer applies; serialize reconstructs the bracket byte-exact (§7.6). Bytes from the reference parser.

source: 本文［＃「注」は下付き小文字］

expected.serialize: 本文［＃「注」は下付き小文字］
